## Summary

- [ ] Branch name is `feature/<slug>`
- [ ] Change is scoped and reviewed before merge
- [ ] Tests, lint, and build pass locally
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local config files were added
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I verified this does not require direct pushes to `main`
- [ ] I confirmed any new dependencies are necessary
- [ ] I checked for security impact
